name: EducateChainVault

methods.name: create
methods.desc: Initialise the vault with a treasury wallet and accepted stablecoin ASA.

methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc:
Bootstrap the vault — call after funding the app account.
Sets the admin as the first reviewer (requires box MBR).

methods.name: opt_in_to_asset
methods.desc: Contract opts into the accepted stablecoin so it can receive donations.

methods.name: deposit_donation
methods.desc:
Accept a stablecoin donation.
The caller must send a grouped ASA transfer immediately before this app call.  We verify:   • The ASA matches our accepted asset   • The receiver is the contract address   • The amount is > 0

methods.name: request_course_payout
methods.desc: Register a course for payout review.

methods.name: approve_course_payout
methods.desc: Reviewer approves a course — contract auto-sends ASA to seller.

methods.name: reject_course_payout
methods.desc: Reviewer rejects a course — escrow is deleted.

methods.name: withdraw_monthly_oracle_amount
methods.desc: Treasury withdraws the AI-billing amount (read from oracle off-chain).

methods.name: reset_monthly_counter
methods.desc: Reset the monthly withdrawal tracker (called at month start).

methods.name: get_total_donations
methods.desc: Return the total donations held in the vault.

methods.name: get_withdrawn_this_month
methods.desc: Return amount withdrawn this month for AI billing.

methods.name: get_accepted_asset_id
methods.desc: Return the accepted stablecoin ASA ID.

methods.name: get_course_escrow_amount
methods.desc: Return the escrowed amount for a course (0 if none).

methods.name: get_course_escrow_approved
methods.desc: Return whether a course escrow has been approved (1) or not (0).

methods.name: is_reviewer
methods.desc: Check if an address is a reviewer.

desc: Vault that manages education donations, course payouts, and AI billing.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Asset does not match accepted ASA
Only admin can opt in to assets
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
